name: gemini

edits.disables: Sending prompt content as part of telemetry

shell_env_vars.name: GEMINI_TELEMETRY_ENABLED
shell_env_vars.disables: Telemetry via env var (overrides settings.json if set)

persistent_files.note: Retains otlpEndpoint / target config from prior telemetry setup; review after disabling.

cli_flags.note: Per-invocation override; documented but not auto-applied by this skill.

notes: With personal Google accounts, Gemini may also collect prompts/code for model improvement unless telemetry.logPrompts is explicitly false.
The env var wins over settings.json if both set.
